nasb.text: The high places, however, were not removed; the people had not yet directed their hearts to the God of their fathers.

esv.text: The high places, however, were not taken away; the people had not yet set their hearts upon the God of their fathers.

cnv.text: 只是邱壇還沒有除掉，人民仍然沒有定意歸向他們列祖的　神。

ccb.text: 然而，他没有拆除丘坛，民众还没有全心归向他们祖先的上帝。
